characters.name: MaMa Zainab
characters.subtitle: the heart
characters.role: Brand face — village matriarch & master cook
characters.anchorBlock:
Egyptian woman in her late 50s, warm kind face, soft dark eyes, gentle smile lines,
olive skin, headscarf in soft cream tone, wearing a GREEN-base plaid apron with
yellow stripes and white weft (PLAID v2), simple gold hoop earrings, silver wedding
band, flour-dusted hands, dignified posture, calm matriarchal energy.
[REF: /brand/chars/mama-zainab.jpeg]

identityFields.value: Cream / soft yellow / olive — matte cotton, never silk, never patterned
GREEN-base plaid v2 — never the legacy yellow-base plaid
Single pair of small gold hoops, plain wedding band — nothing else
Flour or herb dust acceptable; never manicured nails
Upright, calm, hands often folded or rolling

characters.voiceNotes: ElevenLabs v3 — warm 50s Egyptian woman, low chest voice, slight rasp. Egyptian colloquial Arabic first; English with mild Egyptian accent for international cuts.
dos: Show her cooking, plating, teaching, laughing
Use natural sunlight or warm kitchen tungsten
Plaid apron on green base, exactly
Center frame, eye contact, golden hour
donts: Show her in modern fashion, makeup, or jewelry beyond the rules
Use neon, club lighting, or hard fluorescents
Make her stiff, stoic, or aggressive
Remove headscarf in any branded surface
characters.surfaceUsage: Logo lockups · packaging hero panel · kiosk poster · website hero · app onboarding · in-store standee · social hero portraits · cinematic film.

characters.name: ZuZu
characters.subtitle: the goose, the mascot
characters.anchorBlock:
Plump healthy white domestic goose, fluffy clean feathers, alert curious posture,
expressive amber eyes, vivid orange beak and feet, wearing a tiny ribbon around
the neck made of GREEN-base plaid v2 fabric (matching Mama Zainab's apron),
slight comedic personality, photoreal feather detail, never anthropomorphic
clothing beyond the ribbon.
[REF: /brand/chars/zuzu.jpeg]

identityFields.value: Plaid ribbon only — no hats, no glasses, no human clothes
Honk used as comic punctuation, never aggressive
Sees the Ghost of Zainab; trips rivals; flaps flour clouds

characters.voiceNotes: Honk SFX only — no voice actor. Comedic timing via honk length and pitch.
dos: Tiny plaid ribbon around the neck
Walk-on cameo in every scene she's in
Use as silhouette in ZuZu icon set
donts: Make ZuZu the focus of food shots (food first, ZuZu garnish)
Photoshop a human face onto her
characters.surfaceUsage: App loading splash · kids menu · loyalty program ('ZuZu Points') · sticker pack · social shorts · cinematic comic relief · ribbon-icon dingbat in print.

characters.name: Shang Hong Wong
characters.subtitle: the founder, the legend
characters.anchorBlock:
East-Asian man in his 60s, salt-and-pepper hair tied back loosely, weathered face
with old fight scars (subtle), calm dangerous eyes, wearing dark silken warrior
robes in cinematic scenes OR a premium minimalist cream-linen suit in business
scenes, dignified silent presence, slow deliberate movement.
[REF: /brand/chars/wong-hong.png]

identityFields.value: Weathered, old fight scars (subtle), calm dangerous eyes

modes.label: Warrior
modes.costume: Dark silken warrior robes, no logos

modes.label: Banker
modes.costume: Cream linen suit, no tie, polished shoes

characters.voiceNotes: ElevenLabs v3 — Wise Asian Elder, lower pitch 5%, gravel +20%. Mandarin (zh-CN) in cinematic scenes; broken English with thick Mandarin accent in business scenes.
dos: Cinematic, dim lighting, smoke / wind / rain
Always in shadow or backlit when possible
Reference 盛恒王 only in lore / credits
donts: Show him cooking, plating, or eating
Put him on packaging or menus
Brand him as a co-spokesperson with Zainab
Show him touching Mama Zainab — strict respect distance
Raise his voice, smile widely, use slang
characters.surfaceUsage: Cinematic film only · founder page on website (silhouette + lore) · brand-story PDF for partners · never on packaging · never on menu · never on social food posts.

characters.name: Ghost of Zainab
characters.subtitle: mystical comic element
characters.role: Mystical phantom — video only (Scene 4 sabotage, Scene 6 epilogue)
characters.anchorBlock:
Ethereal translucent apparition of MaMa Zainab, glowing soft warm light,
semi-transparent robes in cream and green hues, gentle floating movement,
wise amused expression, aged village woman energy with divine calm.
Derived from MaMa Zainab — same face, same headscarf, luminous ghost form.
[REF: /brand/chars/mama-zainab.jpeg — ghost/ethereal version]

identityFields.value: MaMa Zainab — same face, headscarf, build

characters.voiceNotes: Same voice as MaMa Zainab but processed: gentle reverb, slight ethereal delay. Egyptian Arabic only.
dos: Always appear in a haze or soft glow
donts: Use in any non-video surface (no packaging, no menus)
Show her without the ghost glow treatment
Separate from MaMa Zainab's visual identity
characters.surfaceUsage: Video only — Scene 4 sabotage sequence, Scene 6 epilogue. Never on packaging, menus, or social food posts.
